about.label: About Us
about.title: A Technology Company Focused on Real Solutions
about.p1: Teridox was born from a deep passion for technology and the belief that every business deserves the best software solutions. We build more than products — we build the technology foundation that drives real growth.
about.p2: With a dedicated team and strong commitment since 2024, we stand as your trusted technology partner ready to help your business grow.
about.subtitle: We are an experienced team of developers dedicated to delivering the best technology solutions for your business

story.title: Our Story
story.content: Teridox was founded in 2024 with a drive to help Indonesian businesses access affordable and reliable technology solutions. We believe good technology must be accessible, scalable, and truly solve real business problems. Starting from scratch, we have grown steadily and now serve clients from various industries with web development, mobile apps, and software sales services.

mission.title: Mission
mission.content: To help Indonesian businesses grow by providing high-quality, affordable, and precisely targeted web development, mobile apps, and software services.

vision.title: Vision
vision.content: To become the leading technology company in Indonesia, known for quality, reliability, and positive impact on every client we serve.

items.title: Integrity
items.desc: We are transparent, honest, and committed on every project.

items.desc: Always adopting the latest technology to deliver the best solutions.

items.title: Collaboration
items.desc: We work as partners, not just vendors.

items.title: Quality

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our services and working process

items.q: How long does website development take?
items.a: Development time varies by complexity. A company profile website: 2–4 weeks. A web app with complex features: 2–4 months. We always provide a timeline estimate at the start of the project.

items.q: How much does mobile app development cost?
items.a: Cost depends on the platform (iOS/Android/both), features, and complexity. Starting from IDR 30 million for simple apps up to hundreds of millions for enterprise apps. Contact us for a free estimate.

items.q: What software products are available for purchase?
items.a: We offer a range of officially licensed software, including business management, accounting & finance, HR & payroll, and more. Contact us to view our full catalog and get a recommendation suited to your needs.

items.q: Does Teridox provide maintenance after the project is done?
items.a: Yes! We provide monthly maintenance packages that include security updates, bug fixes, server monitoring, and technical support. Packages start from IDR 1.5 million/month.
We use modern technologies: Next.js, React, TypeScript for frontend; Node.js, Python for backend; Flutter & React Native for mobile; AWS, Vercel, Supabase for cloud infrastructure.
Our process: (1) Consultation & discovery, (2) Proposal & contract, (3) Design & prototyping, (4) Agile sprint development, (5) Testing & QA, (6) Deployment, (7) Handover & training.

items.q: Can I request changes during the development process?
items.a: Absolutely! We use agile methodology with 2-week sprints, so feedback and changes can be integrated flexibly. Major changes outside the original scope may require an addendum.

items.q: Does Teridox serve clients outside Bali?
items.a: Yes! We serve clients from across Indonesia. Our workflow is fully remote-friendly with collaboration tools like Figma, Notion, and Slack.
